title: 9 Marks of a Godly Brother Who'll Actually Call You Out
caption:
Your group chat has jokes. Does it have anyone who'll actually call you out?

A real brother asks the question you don't want to answer. He shows up when it costs him something. He tells you the truth even when you'll be mad at him for a week. Proverbs 27:17 wasn't written about people who only agree with you.

Most men have plenty of guys who like their posts. Few have even one who'd rather lose the friendship than watch them drift.

Check your list. If nobody on it fits more than two or three of these, that's worth naming to someone this week.

#faith #brotherhood #christianman #godlyman #accountability #discipleship
